summary: Regression test after code review fixes (useCallback + module-level motion/style constants + useMemo markers). All primary checks pass: no infinite fetch loop, map/cards/animations render, backend healthy, no console errors.
passed: Backend /api/dashboard, /api/commodities, /api/news, /api/countries, /api/predictions all 200 with correct payload shapes (6 commodities, 10 news, 15 countries, 6 predictions)
CRITICAL: exactly 1 /api/dashboard call on initial load, 0 additional over 4s wait — useCallback fix did NOT introduce infinite loop
WorldMap renders: 32 leaflet tiles loaded, 15 interactive country markers (useMemo refactor OK)
CommodityCard grid: exactly 6 cards render (XAU/XAG/WTI/NG/ZW/ZC) with module constants refactor
Refresh button triggers exactly 1 additional /api/dashboard fetch (1 -> 2), page remains visible
Framer Motion header/map/news animations render on mount (visual confirmed via screenshot)
0 console errors on dashboard page load and after refresh

failed.area: sidebar navigation (secondary, not in code-review scope)
failed.issue: Clicking sidebar 'News Feed' link in Playwright didn't change URL from / to /news (link may not have href or click was intercepted). Direct navigation to /news returns 200. Not a regression from the reviewed changes.
failed.evidence: After clicking a[href='/news'], page.url remained '/'. Curl to /news returns HTTP 200 but 'coming soon' text is client-rendered post-hydration and not verified in this pass.

action_items: No blocker action items. Regression clean. Optional: main agent may want to verify sidebar Link components use proper Next.js <Link href> for client-side nav (not part of the reviewed changes).
